repair_options: Clarify scope: specify aspects of language (e.g., syntax, semantics) or intelligence (e.g., fluid, crystallized) to focus research.

Request preferred sources: academic papers, books, or interdisciplinary perspectives (e.g., cognitive science, linguistics, AI).
